prompt: Ultra-detailed cinematic travel poster of Raja Ampat, Indonesia, viewed from a high tropical cliff overlooking a breathtaking turquoise lagoon filled with lush limestone karst islands and crystal-clear shallow reefs. A female traveler wearing a straw hat, white shirt, shorts, sandals, and a small backpack stands on the rocky viewpoint with her back facing the camera, admiring the panoramic paradise scenery. Vibrant emerald-green islands rise dramatically from the ocean, surrounded by glowing aqua water, small wooden boats drifting through the lagoons, distant mountain silhouettes, and a tropical sunset casting warm golden light across the landscape. Massive fluffy clouds fill the bright blue sky with a bird soaring overhead, creating an epic adventurous atmosphere. Vintage luxury travel-poster aesthetic with soft paper texture border, ultra-realistic details, rich tropical colors, dramatic lighting, depth, atmospheric perspective, and bold typography at the bottom reading “RAJA AMPAT – INDONESIA – WEST PAPUA”. Vertical composition, highly cinematic, photorealistic, 8k quality.
